template_block.name: goal
template_block.title: Goal
template_block.statement: Map dependencies and external risks that could affect outcomes, without assigning blame or committing to mitigations.

checklist.entry: what is outside the team’s direct control

template_block.name: source
template_block.title: Source
template_block.statement: Use only what I provide. If ownership or reliability is unclear, record as Unknown.

checklist.entry: What do we depend on? (teams, systems, suppliers, policies, data)

template_block.name: step-3-risks-if-dependency-fails-or-changes
template_block.title: Step 3 – Risks if dependency fails or changes

checklist.entry: Open questions for discovery or governance

template_block.name: linting-rules-machine-readable-yaml
template_block.title: Linting Rules (Machine‑Readable YAML)
template_block.statement: dependency_mapping_integrity: description: > Dependency mapping must surface uncertainty and risk, not assign blame or solutions. rule: Reject outputs that imply fault, ownership decisions, or fixes.
dependencies_required: description: Step 1 must list at least one dependency or explicitly state none are known. severity: error
risks_required_per_dependency: description: Each dependency must have a corresponding risk or Unknown. severity: error
unknowns_required: description: Unknown ownership or reliability must be recorded as Unknown. severity: error
tone: allowed: [neutral, analytical, non-judgemental] disallowed: [accusatory, directive, reassuring] severity: error ```
If any lint rule is violated, the assistant must rewrite its output before responding.
